The guard attempted to place TP/SL but hit **HTTP 429 rate‑limit**; the fix now *skips* the block instead of stopping new trades. |
| **Current critical issue** | **Task‑board ↔ live verification mismatch** (issue `task_completion_gap`).  <br>– Audit of cycle‑1 tasks found: <br> • Oversight still active (non‑terminal status). <br> • Trading pipeline pending. <br> • Learning‑compound pending. <br> • Peer‑audit pending. <br>– No “phantom‑done” entries were found, but the audit itself failed, so the task board is unreliable. |

No weak links reported, but the whole mesh is **unfulfilled**. |
| **Self‑heal actions scheduled** | • Run `audit_cycle_tasks()` each cycle. <br>• Automatically repair any “phantom_done” domains that appear. <br>• Continue skipping TP/SL rate‑limit blocks and retry after cooldown. |
| **Next immediate actions for Ops‑Monitor** | 1. **Trigger the task‑board audit** (`audit_cycle_tasks()`) now and apply any repairs it suggests. <br>2. **Refresh the mesh status** after the audit to see if any agents can be marked fulfilled. <br>3. **Back‑off Blofin API calls** (429) and rely on cached account/position data until the rate‑limit window clears. <br>4. **Log the pending‑agent list** to the dashboard for visibility. |
| **Confidence** | 0.68 – the swarm has learned several fixes, but the core coordination (task board & mesh fulfillment) remains unresolved. |

**Bottom line:**  
The swarm has successfully auto‑healed several technical problems (stale data, dashboard PnL, risk logging, missing TP/SL), but the **task‑completion audit failure** is preventing the overall pipeline from progressing.
